name: Managed Services
description: Our Managed Services help organizations proactively manage and optimize their IT infrastructure, ensuring high availability, performance, and business continuity.

name: DC & DR Management
description: We provide Data Center (DC) and Disaster Recovery (DR) management services to ensure business continuity, backup, failover, and infrastructure resilience.

name: Consulting Services
description: Our consulting experts help organizations with IT strategy, digital transformation, cloud adoption, infrastructure planning, and technology optimization.

name: Cloud Services
description: We provide cloud migration, cloud management, AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Kubernetes, DevOps, and cloud security solutions.

name: Application Modernization
description: Modernize legacy applications using microservices, containers, APIs, cloud-native architecture, and DevOps best practices.

name: Managed SOC & NOC
description: 24×7 Security Operations Center (SOC) and Network Operations Center (NOC) services including monitoring, incident response, SIEM, and infrastructure monitoring.

name: Managed Cybersecurity Services
description: Protect your organization with vulnerability management, penetration testing, endpoint protection, firewall management, threat intelligence, and security monitoring.

name: Compliance
description: We assist organizations in meeting ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, GDPR, RBI, and other regulatory compliance requirements.
